RemediationStrings.Title: EnableMailslots (Lanman Workstation)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Bowser\EnableMailslots must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Lanman Workstation.

RemediationStrings.Title: AllowInsecureGuestAuth (Lanman Workstation)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LanmanWorkstation\AllowInsecureGuestAuth must be 0. Severity: High. Category: Lanman Workstation.

RemediationStrings.Title: AuditInsecureGuestLogon (Lanman Workstation)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LanmanWorkstation\AuditInsecureGuestLogon must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Lanman Workstation.

RemediationStrings.Title: AuditServerDoesNotSupportEncryption (Lanman Workstation)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LanmanWorkstation\AuditServerDoesNotSupportEncryption must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Lanman Workstation.

RemediationStrings.Title: AuditServerDoesNotSupportSigning (Lanman Workstation)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LanmanWorkstation\AuditServerDoesNotSupportSigning must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Lanman Workstation.

RemediationStrings.Title: MaxSmb2Dialect (Lanman Workstation)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LanmanWorkstation\MaxSmb2Dialect must be 785. Severity: High. Category: Lanman Workstation.

RemediationStrings.Title: MinSmb2Dialect (Lanman Workstation)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LanmanWorkstation\MinSmb2Dialect must be 768. Severity: High. Category: Lanman Workstation.

RemediationStrings.Title: RequireEncryption (Lanman Workstation)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LanmanWorkstation\RequireEncryption must be 0. Severity: High. Category: Lanman Workstation.

RemediationStrings.Title: EnablePlainTextPassword (Lanman Workstation)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Services\LanmanWorkstation\Parameters\EnablePlainTextPassword must be 0. Severity: High. Category: Lanman Workstation.

RemediationStrings.Title: RequireSecuritySignature (Lanman Workstation)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Services\LanmanWorkstation\Parameters\RequireSecuritySignature must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Lanman Workstation.
